channel.title: Equipment on Dark Pawns
channel.description: Recent content in Equipment on Dark Pawns

item.title: Equipment Database
item.description:
equipment*

This is the equipment section of the page. By no means is this meant to be a complete list of the extensive equipment available on Dark Pawns, but it is a reference for some of the best items you can attain, as well as “basic” items. Also available are racial weapons, the list of battleground items you need to make SBA, and much more. I’ve identified the equipment so you don’t have to. If you would like to contribute an item’s statistics that I’ve forgotten, please don’t hesitate to send the webmaster an email.
